title: Our Facility

banner.alt: factory-banner - Lihe precision mold production facility

headline: 15,000 sqm of Precision Manufacturing
intro: Our purpose-built facility in Foshan integrates advanced machining, assembly, and quality inspection under one roof — enabling complete control over every stage of mold production.

sections.title: Engineering & Design Center
sections.description: Our design center houses dedicated CAD/CAM workstations where experienced mold engineers develop and validate mold designs using 3D simulation and flow analysis before production begins.

image.alt: office - Lihe engineering and design center

sections.title: Production Workshop
sections.description: Over 10,000 sqm of climate-controlled production floor space equipped with high-precision CNC machining centers, EDM machines, and grinding systems from world-leading manufacturers.

items.title: CNC Machining Centers
items.description: Multi-axis CNC systems from Mazak, Makino, and Haas deliver micron-level precision for core, cavity, and mold base components.

items.title: Advanced Processing Equipment
items.description: High-speed EDM, wire-cut EDM, and precision surface grinders from Okamoto and Sodick ensure superior surface finish and tight tolerances on critical mold components.

image.alt: sophisticated-equipment - Advanced EDM and grinding equipment

items.title: Quality Inspection Lab
items.description: Zeiss coordinate measuring machines, 3D profile scanners, and optical comparators provide comprehensive dimensional verification at every production milestone.

image.alt: qc-equipment - Zeiss CMM quality inspection laboratory

sections.title: Global Sales Network
sections.description: Our molds are delivered to customers across 50+ countries spanning Asia, Europe, the Americas, Africa, and the Middle East. Regional sales representatives and technical service partners ensure responsive local support.

sections.title: After-Sale Technical Support
sections.description: Dedicated service engineers provide remote troubleshooting, on-site technical assistance, spare parts supply, and mold maintenance programs to keep your production running at peak performance.

sections.title: Custom Solutions
sections.description: Beyond standard mold configurations, we engineer custom solutions for unique bottle designs, specialized neck finishes, material trials, and production line conversions — tailored precisely to your requirements.

image.alt: custom-solutions - Lihe custom mold design collaboration
